tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Twenty-One-Year-Old Bryce Eldridge Hits Walk-Off Grand Slam, Youngest Ever to End a Game This Way
stories.summary: Twenty-one-year-old Bryce Eldridge became MLB's youngest ever to end a game with a grand slam, his 326-foot pop-up completing an eight-run comeback.

stories.headline: Mystery of Village Knitter 'Granny H' Solved: Ninety-Year-Old June Hood Revealed
stories.summary: After three years of anonymously stitching joy throughout her village, ninety-year-old June Hood was revealed as the beloved 'Granny H' who warmed neighbors and children's hearts.

stories.headline: After 1,376 Days Away, Serena Williams Returns to Professional Tennis With Her Family Cheering
stories.summary: After 1,376 days away, Serena Williams returned to competitive tennis at Queen's Club in London, playing doubles with 19-year-old Victoria Mboko.

stories.headline: Against All Odds, Endangered Steelhead Trout Survived the Fire—and Had Babies
stories.summary: Biologists discovered 30 endangered steelhead and 21 newborns thriving in Topanga Creek after the Palisades fire, sparking 'happy dancing' among conservation scientists.

stories.headline: Fifteen-Year-Old Hero Saves Boy's Life, Then Campaigns for Station Defibrillators
stories.summary: Teen Jordan Kerr used CPR to save a boy at his local train station, then fought to install lifesaving defibrillators for the entire community.

stories.headline: Pancreatic Cancer Patients Nearly Double Survival Time With Breakthrough Medication
stories.summary: Pancreatic cancer patients nearly doubled survival time with daraxonrasib, gaining roughly 13 precious months with less pain and better quality of life.

stories.headline: Giants' Eight-Run Comeback Crowned by Eldridge's Ninth-Inning Grand Slam
stories.summary: The Giants' first eight-run comeback since 1947 was capped by rookie Bryce Eldridge's walk-off grand slam in the ninth inning.

stories.headline: Boston Biotech Firm Reverses Cellular Aging in First Human Gene Therapy Treatment
stories.summary: A groundbreaking gene therapy designed to reverse aging was successfully administered to restore vision in eye disease patients, opening new frontiers in regenerative medicine.

stories.headline: World's First AI-Designed Vaccine Successfully Tested in Humans
stories.summary: Cambridge researchers tested the world's first AI-designed vaccine in humans, a needle-free DNA shot protecting against multiple coronavirus variants.

stories.headline: Terry Deets, Calgary's 'Honorary Mayor,' Retires After 42 Years at Food Bank
stories.summary: Terry Deets, Calgary's 'Honorary Mayor,' retired after 42 years at the food bank, cherished for his infectious smile and daily Tim Hortons coffee ritual.

stories.headline: Serena Williams and Rising Star Victoria Mboko Stun Crowd at Queen's Club
stories.summary: Serena Williams and 19-year-old Victoria Mboko formed instant chemistry to defeat seasoned opponents, proving Williams' tennis story is far from over.

stories.headline: California Condor Spotted in Southern Oregon for First Time in Over a Century
stories.summary: Young condor B9 completed a nearly 400-mile flight from Northern California to Southern Oregon, the first California condor sighting there in over a century.

stories.headline: Portland Couple Spends Years Freely Transporting Elderly and Sick to Care
stories.summary: James and Miranda Schrikker have spent years providing free transport for elderly and sick neighbors in Mitchell's Plain to hospitals and appointments.

stories.headline: Electric Airplane Soars on Solid-State Batteries in Historic Test Flight
stories.summary: Helios Horizon's electric airplane successfully flew with solid-state batteries, carrying pilot Miguel Iturmendi in a historic test of cleaner aviation.
